resources.title: Grokking Deep Learning
resources.evidence_quote: I'll be borrowing an analogy from Andrew Trask's grokking deep learning, which is published by Manning.

resources.title: Kaggle Chest X-Ray Pneumonia Dataset by Paul Timothy Mooney
resources.evidence_quote: we are going to be looking at chest X rays to determine if the, X-ray, presents with pneumonia or does not.
